sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, start_time TIMESTAMPTZ, end_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, start_time, end_time) VALUES (2, '2021-12-30 18:00:00+02:00', NULL);
SELECT sql_sub(start_time, end_time) AS time_difference FROM test_table WHERE end_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sql_sub(start_time, timestamptz(date '2021-12-31')) AS days_difference FROM test_table WHERE start_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(sql_sub(start_time, end_time)) FROM (SELECT sql_sub(start_time, end_time) FROM test_table WHERE start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE sql_sub(start_time, TIMESTAMPTZ '2020-01-01 00:00:00+00:00') > INTERVAL '0 seconds';
SELECT id, sql_sub(start_time, end_time) AS duration FROM test_table HAVING duration > 86400;
SELECT t1.id, sql_sub(t1.start_time, t2.end_time) FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON sql_sub(t1.start_time, t2.start_time) < INTERVAL '12 hours' WHERE t2.end_time IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, date(start_time) AS start_date FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE start_date < date('2022-01-01');
SELECT sql_sub(timestamptz(date '2021-12-31'), timestamptz(date '2021-12-30')) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
